title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Prudential Life Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Prudential Life Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
ICICI Prudential Life Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About ICICI Prudential Life Global Group:
ICICI Prudential Life Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Prudential Life Global Group!
